summary: Checkout latency rose when the payment gateway timed out.
resolution: Escalated to payments on-call and monitored checkout recovery after provider timeout rate dropped.

summary: Retry rollout caused request amplification and checkout latency.
resolution: Requested rollback approval, disabled retry flag after approval, and verified latency recovery.

summary: Search workers saturated during traffic spike.
resolution: Applied runbook-guided capacity mitigation and verified CPU returned below threshold.
